_metadata.description: LA-specific housing pathway endpoint data for the Street Support Network Virtual Assistant. Contains hardcoded local organisations for housing-related pathways. This file is the authoritative source — do not duplicate in TypeScript files.
_metadata.verified: February 2026 — council websites, org websites, enrichment pipeline data
_metadata.change_control: Operational changes (contact detail updates): MD authority, documented in CHANGELOG.md. Changes affecting routing logic: governance review required.

notes.national_hardcoded: National orgs (Shelter, Project 17, Migrant Help, AKT, Stonewall Housing, ManKind Initiative, Galop, National DV Helpline) are hardcoded in the VA codebase and do NOT appear in this file.
notes.migrant_advice_portal: Migrant Advice Portal (migrantadvice.org/interact) is a self-service signposting tool, not a referral service. Shown for all LAs on NRPF pathway as a supplement to local orgs.
notes.dynamic_layer: DV specialists and LGBTQ+ specialists from the SSN catalogue (AUTO_VERIFY enrichment data) are surfaced separately via service matching. This file covers hardcoded local orgs only.

navigatorOrgs.name: SIFA Fireside
navigatorOrgs.description: Drop-in housing advice and support for single adults experiencing homelessness. Broad knowledge of local housing pathways.

navigatorOrgs.name: St Basil's Birmingham
navigatorOrgs.description: Specialist housing support for young people. Help to find and keep a home.

womensAid.name: Birmingham and Solihull Women's Aid
womensAid.oohNote: National DV Helpline (0808 2000 247) covers out of hours

immigrationOrgs.name: Refugee and Migrant Centre (RMC)
immigrationOrgs.description: Advice and support on immigration, housing and related matters.

immigrationOrgs.name: Brushstrokes Community Project
immigrationOrgs.description: Support for migrants and refugees including housing and immigration advice. Based in Smethwick, serving Birmingham and Sandwell.

navigatorOrgs.name: P3 Coventry
navigatorOrgs._canonicalNote: Phone verified from p3charity.org (primary source) and Google Maps. Navigator org numbers are sourced from organisations directly — la-contacts.json covers council services only.
navigatorOrgs.description: Housing support for individuals and families experiencing or at risk of homelessness.

navigatorOrgs.name: St Basil's Coventry Youth Hub
navigatorOrgs.description: Specialist housing support for young people. Help to find and keep a home.

allGenders.name: Valley House
allGenders.description: Domestic abuse accommodation and support. Open to all genders.

immigrationOrgs.name: Coventry Refugee and Migrant Centre
immigrationOrgs.description: Advice and support for refugees and migrants including housing and immigration matters.

navigatorOrgs.name: Lighthouse Community Hub
navigatorOrgs.availabilityNote: Monday evenings only — limited availability. Documented system gap.

immigrationOrgs.name: Refugee and Migrant Centre (RMC)
immigrationOrgs.description: Advice and support on immigration, housing and related matters.

sandwell.name: Sandwell
sandwell._navigatorGap: No housing navigator organisation identified for Sandwell. Documented as a system gap — shared with local partnership.

immigrationOrgs.description: Support for migrants and refugees including housing and immigration advice.

solihull.name: Solihull

navigatorOrgs.name: St Basil's Solihull Youth Hub
navigatorOrgs.description: Specialist housing support for young people, commissioned by Solihull Housing Options.

womensAid.name: Birmingham and Solihull Women's Aid
womensAid.oohNote: National DV Helpline (0808 2000 247) covers out of hours

solihull._immigrationGap: No general immigration support organisation identified for Solihull. Migrant Advice Portal (migrantadvice.org/interact) is the fallback. Specialist orgs in SSN data (Micro Rainbow, Panahghar) are not suitable for general NRPF routing — they serve specific populations the VA does not profile for.

navigatorOrgs.description: Housing advice and support for people experiencing homelessness.
